definition: The native CSS feature for tethering one element to another (anchor-name / position-anchor / anchor()) and reflowing it on overflow with position-try, no JS. The platform substrate behind the Anchor Positioning Protocol; distinct from the protocol concept (the swappable meaning) — this names the engine.
usage: Resolved native-first via the capabilityMatrix as the substrate for the Anchor Positioning Protocol (Web Positioning); a JS positioner is the polyfill fallback.
